name: prompt-to-asset
description: Prompt enhancer + asset pipeline: one brief to iOS/Android/PWA/favicon/OG via routed image models.
long_description: Turn a one-line brief into a complete, ship-ready asset bundle — app icons, favicons, OG images, illustrations, splash screens. Three modes: inline_svg (zero-key, host LLM writes the SVG), external_prompt_only (paste into your subscription), api (server-driven via OpenAI / Gemini / Ideogram / Recraft / Flux / Stability / Leonardo / fal.ai / Replicate / HF / Cloudflare / Pollinations / Stable Horde / ComfyUI). 24 MCP tools including asset_enhance_prompt, asset_generate_logo / app_icon / favicon / og_image / illustration / hero / splash_screen, asset_save_inline_svg, asset_ingest_external, asset_train_brand_lora, asset_doctor (with auto_fix), asset_models_list, asset_models_inspect, asset_export_bundle, asset_sprite_sheet, asset_nine_slice, asset_init_brand.

GEMINI_API_KEY.title: Google AI Studio / Gemini key (paid image API; free paste-only UI)
GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Get from https://aistudio.google.com/apikey. Programmatic image output requires billing: gemini-2.5-flash-image (original Nano Banana, $0.039/img), gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview (Nano Banana 2, $0.045/0.5K $0.067/1K $0.101/2K $0.151/4K), gemini-3-pro-image-preview (Nano Banana Pro, $0.134 at 1K/2K $0.24 at 4K + $0.0011 per input image), Imagen 4 Fast $0.02, Standard $0.04, Ultra $0.06. For free Google-quality output: AI Studio web UI (https://aistudio.google.com, paste-only, call asset_ingest_external after downloading) or Gemini consumer app. Cloudflare Workers AI, NVIDIA NIM, HF Inference, and Stable Horde are the free programmatic alternatives.

OPENAI_API_KEY.title: OpenAI key
OPENAI_API_KEY.description: gpt-image-1 / gpt-image-1.5 / dall-e-3. Best for native-RGBA transparent PNGs.

BFL_API_KEY.title: Black Forest Labs Flux key
BFL_API_KEY.description: Flux Pro / Flux.2 / Kontext — photoreal hero art.

FAL_API_KEY.title: fal.ai key
FAL_API_KEY.description: Aggregator — alt path for Flux / SDXL.

HF_TOKEN.title: Hugging Face token (free tier)
HF_TOKEN.description: Read token from https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens. No credit card.

REPLICATE_API_TOKEN.title: Replicate token
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN.description: Flux 1.1 Pro / SDXL / SD3 / Recraft V3 / Ideogram V3.

NVIDIA_API_KEY.title: NVIDIA NIM key (free 1k requests/month)
NVIDIA_API_KEY.description: Get from https://build.nvidia.com. Enables free-token CLI generation via Flux.1-dev, Flux.2-klein, SDXL Turbo, SD 3.5 Large, and SANA. No credit card.

P2A_MAX_SPEND_USD_PER_RUN.title: Cost cap (USD per tool call)
P2A_MAX_SPEND_USD_PER_RUN.description: Optional. Pre-flight refuses api-mode calls above this cap.
